title: AI System Design: From Idea to Production - Apoorva Joshi, MongoDB
summary: Apoorva Joshi presents a structured framework for designing AI systems from idea to production, arguing that identifying the business problem, defining success metrics, and selecting appropriate architecture are more critical than coding ability. The talk addresses why most AI systems fail to reach production due to poor early-stage decisions and demonstrates the framework applied to real-world problems.
writeup: Apoorva Joshi of MongoDB lays out a structured framework for taking AI systems from idea to production, covering how to identify the business problem, define success metrics, and select appropriate architecture. The central argument is that these early-stage decisions matter more than coding ability, and that poor choices at this stage explain why most AI systems never reach production. The talk applies the framework to real-world problems and touches on system architecture, edge deployment, and precision metrics.
